provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
This Order may be cited as the Declaration of Public Roads and Width of Public Roads Order.

provisions.title: Establishment and declaration of public roads
provisions.content:
2. Establishment and declaration of public roads
The roads described in the Schedule hereto are established and declared as public roads.

provisions.title: Width of road
provisions.content:
3. Width of road
The width of every road described in the Schedule hereto shall be 30,5 metres on either side of the general run of the road.
